# Public API surface of package:quicktype_dart/quicktype_dart.dart
# Generated by tool/api_snapshot.dart — do not edit by hand.
# CI fails if this file drifts without an intentional `dart run tool/api_snapshot.dart --write`.

  ctor Config.defaults()
  ctor Config.fromFile(req String path)
  ctor Config.fromMap(req Map<String, dynamic> map)
  ctor Config.loadOrDefaults(String path)
  ctor ConfigException(req String message, Object? cause)

  ctor DartRendererOptions(bool? {nullSafety}, bool? {justTypes}, bool? {codersInClass}, bool? {fromMap}, bool? {requiredProps}, bool? {finalProps}, bool? {copyWith}, bool? {useFreezed}, bool? {useHive}, bool? {useJsonAnnotation}, String? {partName})

  ctor ElmRendererOptions(bool? {justTypes}, String? {module}, ArrayType? {arrayType})
  ctor EmbeddedBundleSource()

  ctor GoRendererOptions(bool? {justTypes}, bool? {justTypesAndPackage}, String? {package}, bool? {multiFileTarget}, String? {fieldTags}, bool? {omitEmpty})
  ctor HaskellRendererOptions(bool? {justTypes}, String? {module}, ArrayType? {arrayType})
  ctor JavaRendererOptions(ArrayType? {arrayType}, bool? {justTypes}, DateTimeProvider? {datetimeProvider}, AcronymStyle? {acronymStyle}, String? {package}, bool? {lombok}, bool? {lombokCopyAnnotations})
  ctor JavaScriptRendererOptions(bool? {copyAccessorAnnotations}, bool? {runtimeTypecheck}, bool? {runtimeTypecheckIgnoreUnknownProperties}, AcronymStyle? {acronymStyle}, ConverterType? {converters}, RawType? {rawType})
  ctor KotlinRendererOptions(KotlinFramework? {framework}, AcronymStyle? {acronymStyle}, String? {package})
  ctor ObjectiveCRendererOptions(bool? {justTypes}, String? {classPrefix}, ObjectiveCFeatures? {features}, bool? {extraComments}, bool? {functions})
  ctor PHPRendererOptions(bool? {withGet}, bool? {fastGet}, bool? {withSet}, bool? {withClosing}, AcronymStyle? {acronymStyle})
  ctor PropTypesRendererOptions(AcronymStyle? {acronymStyle}, ConverterType? {converters})
  ctor PythonRendererOptions(PythonVersion? {pythonVersion}, bool? {justTypes}, bool? {nicePropertyNames}, bool? {pydanticBaseModel})
  ctor Quicktype(req Config config)
  ctor QuicktypeCommand(req String {sourcePath}, req String {sourceArg}, req String {targetPath}, req String {targetArg}, Map<String, String> {rendererOptions})
  ctor QuicktypeException(req String message, String? {command}, int? {exitCode}, Object? {cause}, StackTrace? {stackTrace})
  ctor QuicktypeResult.failure(req String {sourcePath}, req String {targetPath}, req String? {errorMessage}, String? {targetContent}, String? {stdout}, String? {stderr})
  ctor QuicktypeResult.success(req String {sourcePath}, req String {targetPath}, String? {targetContent}, String? {stdout}, String? {stderr})
  ctor RemoteBundleSource(req Uri url, String? {integrity})
  ctor RendererOptions()
